entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: Environmental challenge involving the decline of land quality across sub-Saharan Africa

entities.description: Region where land degradation is a significant challenge and integrated landscape management is implemented

entities.name: INTEGRATED LANDSCAPE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: An approach to restore degraded landscapes and sustain livelihoods

entities.name: CASE STUDY APPROACH
entities.description: Research method used to appraise restoration innovations in Ethiopia and Mali

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: Country where integrated landscape management practices were studied, specifically in the highlands

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: Country where integrated landscape management practices were studied to reduce soil loss and improve yields

entities.description: Framework used to assess sustainability gains across five domains

entities.description: A domain of the SIAF and a measured outcome of integrated landscape management

entities.description: A domain of the SIAF focusing on financial benefits

entities.description: A domain of the SIAF focusing on ecological health

entities.name: SOCIAL
entities.description: A domain of the SIAF focusing on community and social cohesion

entities.name: HUMAN CONDITION
entities.description: A domain of the SIAF focusing on human well-being

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: An indicator used to measure productivity gains

entities.name: SOIL LOSS

entities.name: NET INCOME
entities.description: An indicator used to measure economic benefits

entities.name: FOOD AVAILABILITY
entities.description: An indicator used to measure human condition and productivity

entities.description: Crop showing significant yield improvement in Ethiopian highlands due to integrated landscape management

entities.description: Products from agroforestry used to increase household income
